basic_details.job_title: IIM Ahmedabad Researcher Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Management Ahmedabad (IIM Ahmedabad)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Management Ahmedabad (IIM Ahmedabad) Researcher Notification 2026 has been released on the official website. Has been announced through the IIM Ahmedabad Researcher Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduation/Post-graduation in maths, finance, statistics, commerce, or data science. Skillset: Data analysis, visualization, econometrics, good writing skills
qualification.details: Graduation/Post-graduation in mathematics, finance, statistics, commerce, or data science. Proficiency in data analysis and visualization. Knowledge of econometrics. Good writing skills.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 15-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIM Ahmedabad Researcher recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the IIM Ahmedabad Researcher position is 15 May 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Researcher role?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have a Graduation or Post-graduation degree in mathematics, finance, statistics, commerce, or data science, along with data analysis, visualization, econometrics, and good writing skills.

faq.question: Q3. How can I apply for this government job?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to send your resume and required documents to the official email address provided by IIM Ahmedabad before the last date.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive at IIM Ahmedabad.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Researcher position?
faq.answer: The salary for the Researcher position will be as per the guidelines of IIM Ahmedabad. Specific details will be available in the official notification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Researcher role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Researcher position will primarily involve an interview, which may be conducted via Zoom.

faq.question: Q7. Is this a permanent or contract job?
faq.answer: This is a contract-based job opportunity at the Indian Institute of Management Ahmedabad.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF link will be available in the 'Important Links' section of this article. It is recommended to download and read it thoroughly.

faq.question: Q9. What is the official website of IIM Ahmedabad?
faq.answer: The official website of the Indian Institute of Management Ahmedabad is iima.ac.in. You can visit it for more information about the institute.
